allow: PowerShell($pid3000 = \(netstat -ano | Select-String ":3000 " | Select-String "LISTENING" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split "\\s+"\)[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1\); if \($pid3000\) { Get-Process -Id $pid3000 | Select-Object Id, ProcessName; } else { Write-Output "없음" })

PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; cd C:\\Dev\\Codeprint; & $gh pr merge --merge --yes)

PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI"; gh pr list)
